empty_page.description: Honoa tō ake rohe īmēra kia tuku karere mai i tō wāhitau īmēra o tō waitohu. Mā tēnei e whakapai ake tō rangatiratanga ā-waitohu, ā, ka āwhina kia rerekē ō karere i roto i ngā pouakaroto a te hunga whiwhi.

overview_page.config_dns_settings_helptext: Whakauruhia ngā rekoata MX, SPF, me DKIM e whai ake nei ki ō tautuhinga DNS kia whakamana {{domain}}.

modal_add_domain.title: Tāpiri i tō wāhitau īmēra

modal_add_domain.validate_domain: Ka taea noa iho e koe te tāpiri i tō ake rohe. Kāore a Trusthop e tautoko ana i ngā rohe tūmatanui (hei tauira, gmail.com, yahoo.com)

modal_delete_domain.title: Mukua te rohe ritenga?
modal_delete_domain.description: Ki te mukua e koe tō ake rohe, ka hoki koe ki te whakamahi i te rohe taunoa, ā, kāore e taea te whakamahi i tēnei rohe. Kāore e taea te whakahoki tēnei mahi. Kei te hiahia koe ki te haere tonu?

unsubscribe_management.title: Whakahaere Wāhitau Kore
unsubscribe_management.subtitle: Aroturuki me te whakahaere i ngā kiritaki kua kore e hiahia ki ō īmēra tono arotake.
unsubscribe_management.delete_unsubscribe_confirm: Kei te tino hiahia koe ki te muku i tēnei īmēra? Kāore e taea te whakahoki tēnei mahi.
unsubscribe_management.no_unsubscribe_description: Ka puta ngā pārongo mō ngā kiritaki kua kore i ngā īmēra ki konei

review_action.delete_confirm: Kāore e taea te whakatika i tēnei mahi, kia whakapau kaha i mua i te whakakore ātete

auto_publish_reviews.title: Arotake aunoa
auto_publish_reviews.sub_title: Tēnā kōwhiria ngā arotake e hiahia ana koe kia arotake aunoa. Ko ngā huringa ka pā anake ki ngā arotake hou.
auto_publish_reviews.auto_publish_reviews_if: Hoki atu ngā arotake hou ki te Toa mēnā:

new_review_notification.title: Karanga arotake hou
new_review_notification.sub_title: Rīpoata imeera mō ngā arotake hou. Kāore e pā mai ngā arotake i tāuta mai e te pokanga.
new_review_notification.send_email_to_merchant_if: Tukua rīpoata imeera ki te kaihokohoko mēnā ka waiho e ngā kiritaki he arotake

new_review_notification.selected_lang_for_system_email: Kōwhiria te reo mō ngā imeera pūnaha

protect_reviews.title: Tiakina ō arotake
protect_reviews.sub_title: Tūhonoa ngā kupu nui hei tiaki i ō arotake me te karo i ngā kōrero ā-kino pērā i te pornograpi, te tutu, te whakatuma, te rūkahu, ngā hono hei tīpoka, me ngā pūmanawa mārama.
protect_reviews.block_additional_words_description: Kua aukatihia kē e mātou ngā kupu whakaititanga rongonui. Tūhonoa atu ngā kupu e hiahia ana koe ki te rārangi.
protect_reviews.add_word_placeholder: Tuhia te kupu matua, ā, paatohia te paatene 'enter'
protect_reviews.no_language_found: Aroha mai, kāore te reo {{lang}} e hāngai

auto_send_email.title: Tukuna īmēra aunoa ki ngā kiritaki
auto_send_email.sub_title: Ka whakautu ana koe ki te arotake a te kiritaki i te wāhanga whakahaere arotake, ka tukuna aunoa e te pūnaha he īmēra ki taua kiritaki me ngā korero o tō whakautu
auto_send_email.send_email_to_merchant_when_source: Tukuna īmēra ki ngā kiritaki ina whakautu koe ki ā rātou arotake mā te puna:

review_translate.title: Ritea te ihirangi a ngā arotake
review_translate.sub_title: Ka taea e ngā kaihoko te whakamahi i te pātene whakawhiti hei whakarākei i te ihirangi ki te reo mātāmua.

multi_lang.title: Ritea te reo o te widget
multi_lang.sub_title: Ka whakarākeitia te ihirangi widget ki te reo o ngā kaihoko i ngā mākete katoa e mahi ana tō toa.
multi_lang.description: Hei paerewa, ka whakaaturia ngā widget arotake katoa i te reo Pākehā. Ka taea i a koe te whakahohe i tēnei āhuatanga, ka huri aunoa te reo e whakaaturia ana i te widget ki te reo o te kaihoko i te whenua kei reira rātou e toro ana.

rich_snippet.title: Tāpae rīki
rich_snippet.description: Tēnā te whakamahi kia waihangahia ngā Tāpae Rīki, hei whakarei i te mārama i ngā hua rapu mā te whakaatu i ngā pārongo tāpiri pēnei i ngā tohu, utu, me te wātea ki runga i ngā hua rapu, e kākahu atu ana te pahekoheko me te whakahou i te SEO.
rich_snippet.seo_description: Ka paereitia ēnei taupānga tāpae i ngā tāpae arotake Trustshop.
rich_snippet.text_field_label: Tāpirihia tāu hono hua hei tirotiro i te tāpae

partner_list.langwill: Whakamāoritia tō toa ki ngā reo 138 me te huri aunoa i ngā moni hei whakatipu hoko puta noa i te ao.

partner_list.shopify_flow: Whakaritea tō toa me te aunoa i ō mahi mā te whakamahi i te ētita waehere-iti a Shopify Flow.
